metadata.description: Kanbantic project management plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: kanbantic-claude-plugin
plugins.description: v2.12.0 completes the version-aware track (KBT-E066 / F318-F320): release→Version rename across the lane-skills, known-mcp-tools.json curated to the live Version tools (12 in, 4 legacy release-tools out), lint Invariant 5 against stale release tokens, and two zero-dep hooks (locked-version-blocker on claim_issue + Stop version-summary). First Application self-released through the new Version-flow. KBT-E087 Agent-orchestratie & modelbeleid: /kanbantic-orchestrate sequencer skill (F436), launch-orchestrator script (F438), context-aware lane-skill gates for Cowork/no-repo (F447), and sync `model:` frontmatter for the new Subagent Model field (F437).
